metadata.description: Multi-agent collaboration loop for non-trivial implementation work, coordinating Claude + Codex + Gemini through a structured 7-step plan/review/code/deploy/verify workflow with fixed artifacts and explicit failure routing.

plugins.name: multi-agent-dev-loop
plugins.description: Multi-agent collaboration workflow for non-trivial implementation tasks: plan → review → code → review → deploy → smoke test → triage, with fixed artifact paths and explicit failure routing.
